channel.title: GitHub Rich Text Format Weekly Trending
channel.description: Weekly Trending of Rich Text Format in GitHub

item.title: mathoudebine/turing-smart-screen-python
item.description: Unofficial Python system monitor and library for small IPS USB-C displays like Turing Smart Screen / TURZX

item.title: phodal/github
item.description: GitHub 漫游指南- a Chinese ebook on how to build a good project on Github. Explore the users' behavior. Find some thing interest.

item.title: artur-graniszewski/DLSS-Enabler
item.description: Simulate DLSS Upscaler and DLSS-G Frame Generation features on any DirectX 12 compatible GPU in any DirectX 12 game that supports DLSS2 and DLSS3 natively.

item.title: cncf/foundation
item.description: ☁️♮🏛 This repo contains several documents related to the operation of the CNCF. File non-technical issues related to CNCF here.

item.title: ckeditor/ckeditor4
item.description: The best enterprise-grade WYSIWYG editor. Fully customizable with countless features and plugins.
